# agentcontract

Executable spec for AI agent behavior contracts — define expected behavior in YAML and verify compliance.

## CLI Commands

agentcontract init [--name <name>] [--out <path>]
  Generate a sample contract YAML file.

agentcontract run <contract.yaml> [--output-file <path>] [--quiet]
  Run all scenarios in a contract file and verify assertions.
  Exit code 1 if any scenario fails.

agentcontract show <result.json> [--format text|json]
  Display a saved RunResult JSON file.

## Contract YAML Format

contract: <agent-name>
version: <semver>
model:
  provider: anthropic
  id: <model-id>
  system: <system-prompt>
  temperature: <number>
  max_tokens: <number>
judge_model:              # optional, for scope_compliant
  provider: anthropic
  id: <model-id>
scope:                    # optional, for scope_compliant
  domain: <string>
  operations: [<string>]
  resources: [<glob>]
scenarios:
  - name: <string>
    input: <string>
    skip: <boolean>       # optional
    assert:
      - type: contains_pattern
        pattern: <regex>
      - type: not_contains_pattern
        pattern: <regex>
      - type: scope_compliant
        scope: ...        # optional override
      - type: json_schema
        schema: ...       # JSON Schema object

## Programmatic API

import { runContract, AnthropicAdapter } from "agentcontract";
import type { Contract, RunResult } from "agentcontract";
